ddls:
CREATE TABLE "detector_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., SiStripApvGain_basic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope (e.g., SiStripApvGain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  "scope_type" TEXT /* Type of scope (e.g., gain, efficiency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable the column belongs to */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column (e.g., GAIN_DETIDS, GAIN_DATA) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the column in the data structure */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the column (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detector_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of detector (e.g., SiStrip, Pixel) */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detector_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the detector configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data scope */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data variable */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data column */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "error_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data point is erroneous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_data_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES data_scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES detector_data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_data_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES data_columns ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_data_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES detector_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detector_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., timestamp, sensor_id) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., sensor data, environmental data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES detector_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access (e.g., query parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES detector_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file (e.g., SHA-256) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES detector_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detector_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES detector_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detector_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
